name: Can I sue my boss if I slipped and fell at work in Ogden?
description: No, file workers' comp claim instead; sue third parties if applicable.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my boss if I slipped and fell at work in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, file workers' comp claim instead; sue third parties if applicable.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Generally no, you must use Utah workers' compensation as the exclusive remedy against your employer.** This system provides benefits without proving fault, but limits recovery to medical costs and lost wages—no pain and suffering.[1][3] Key factors: Exceptions exist for third-party negligence like a subcontractor's spill or defective equipment. Employer intentional harm is rare but possible. Workers' comp applies if injured during work duties. Get a lawyer to check for third-party claims alongside comp.
